title: Legal | Piel en Armonia
description: Clear legal information about site use, privacy, cookies, and the limits of digital medical guidance.

thesis.title: Simple rules for using the site and medical channels
thesis.body: These pages explain what each policy protects, which limits exist, and what you can expect when sharing information.

statement.title: Legal information should still be easy to understand
statement.alt: Legal information at Piel en Armonia

internalMessage.description: These pages organize privacy, consent, and responsible use of digital channels.

terms.heading: Terms and conditions
terms.summary: Conditions for using public content, remote guidance, and official contact channels.

sections.title: Using the site
items: Public information can guide choices, but it does not replace personalized medical consultation.
When you use forms or official channels, the information shared should be real and current.
If the site is misused, access may be limited to protect the service and other people.

sections.title: Content and ownership
items: Texts, images, and designs belong to Piel en Armonia or to authorized third parties.
Commercial reproduction in whole or in part is not allowed without written permission.
References to third-party marks or services are used only for informational purposes.

privacy.heading: Privacy policy
privacy.summary: Responsible handling of personal data, using only what is needed to care for and protect people better.

sections.title: What data we may receive
items: Contact details you share through WhatsApp, forms, or other official channels.
Minimum technical data used for security, site stability, and service improvement.
Clinical information only when you send it for guidance or follow-up.

sections.title: How it is used and protected
items: Data supports continuity of care, operational follow-through, and necessary communication.
Technical and organizational safeguards are applied to reduce unauthorized access.
You may request correction or deletion of data under applicable regulation.

cookies.heading: Cookie policy
cookies.summary: Cookies are used for technical functions, aggregate measurement, and basic browsing preferences.

sections.title: Types of cookies
items: Essential: help the site function with security and stability.
Analytics: show aggregate use so content, performance, and navigation can improve.
Preferences: remember language or simple interface choices.

sections.title: Your choice
items: You may accept or reject cookies that are not essential.
Settings can be changed through the browser or system tools.
Rejecting optional cookies does not block access to the main site content.

medical-disclaimer.heading: Medical disclaimer
medical-disclaimer.summary: Site content can inform, but it does not replace a personalized diagnosis or direct consultation.

sections.title: Limits of digital guidance
items: Site text is not a prescription, a treatment order, or a promise of outcome.
Any treatment decision should be confirmed through individual evaluation by health professionals.
If warning signs appear, in-person or urgent care may be the right next step.

sections.title: Shared responsibility
items: You should report symptoms, history, and recent changes as accurately as possible.
Clinical decisions are made through history, examination, and the evidence available.
Following the plan given has a direct effect on how the case evolves.
